title: Blue Halo Health
summary: A production-ready healthcare platform independently delivered for an international client.
highlights: Built dynamic and configurable admin modules
Implemented user management and secure JWT authentication
Delivered the complete production application independently

title: All Sports Khelo
summary: A large-scale sports tournament platform covering more than 12 sports categories.
highlights: Built an organiser dashboard for complete tournament management
Supported tournament creation, ticket pricing and participant tracking
Implemented result publishing across the tournament lifecycle

title: Dream Car
summary: A multi-category prize-draw platform combining commerce, payments, rewards and secure winner selection.
highlights: Built ticket cart, instant wins, gift cards, wallet and gift-credit systems
Integrated Stripe payments and multi-currency switching
Implemented compliance questions and secure winner selection from eligible tickets

title: NPO
summary: A bilingual SaaS operations platform built for a Japanese client managing welfare, mobility support, respite activities, and day services.
highlights: Unified reservations, schedules, staff, vehicles, and service delivery workflows
Supported multiple organizations through a bilingual English and Japanese experience
Centralized incident tracking, operational reporting, and auditable activity history

title: Marketing Asset Generator
summary: An automation workflow built with n8n and OpenAI that generates marketing creatives from a single product image for multiple platforms.

title: Chennai Flood Mapping ML
summary: A postgraduate research project that predicts flood-prone zones across Chennai using machine learning and spatial datasets.

title: Skincare Recommendation System
summary: A content-based recommendation system that suggests skincare products using ingredient similarity and machine learning classification.
